description: 20 Armory repos selected for F002 check accuracy testing
note: .cursorrules requirement relaxed from 3 to 1 — only 1 repo in entire Armory corpus has .cursorrules (browserbase_stagehand)

repos.name: oven-sh_bun
repos.note: Large project, both entry files, known F5 incident target

repos.name: astral-sh_ruff
repos.note: Well-maintained, SHA-pinned Actions — tests that S2 correctly passes clean CI

repos.name: surrealdb_surrealdb
repos.note: Rust project with CLAUDE.md

repos.name: tldraw
repos.note: Previously validated, known-good reference

repos.name: modelcontextprotocol_python-sdk
repos.note: Anthropic's own MCP SDK — should score well

repos.name: openai_openai-agents-python
repos.note: OpenAI project with both entry files and clean CI

repos.name: cline_cline
repos.note: Has .env — tests S1 gitignore check

repos.name: browserbase_stagehand
repos.note: Only repo with .cursorrules in corpus — tests F1/F6 recognition

repos.name: microsoft_playwright-mcp
repos.note: Microsoft project with CLAUDE.md

repos.name: Infatoshi_OpenSquirrel
repos.note: Has CLAUDE.md but NO CI — tests W2 false negative

repos.name: All-Hands-AI_OpenHands
repos.note: AGENTS.md only, large Python project

repos.name: Significant-Gravitas_AutoGPT
repos.note: AGENTS.md only, popular AI agent project

repos.name: github_gh-aw
repos.note: Go project with AGENTS.md — tests cross-language detection

repos.name: ollama_ollama
repos.note: No entry file, popular Go project — should score low on Findability/Instructions

repos.name: comfyanonymous_ComfyUI
repos.note: No entry file, Python — baseline for 'typical repo without AI support'

repos.name: n8n-io_n8n
repos.note: No entry file, no detected workflows �� tests minimal repo

repos.name: karpathy_autoresearch
repos.note: Small Python project, no CI, no entry file — near-minimum viable repo

repos.name: hoppscotch_hoppscotch
repos.note: Large JS project with .env but no entry file

repos.name: lapce_lapce
repos.note: Rust project, no entry file — tests non-JS/Python repos

repos.name: puppeteer_puppeteer
repos.note: Google project, well-maintained but no entry file
